feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I tried posting on reddit and I noticed that using VPN will immediately lead to …
entry.content: I tried posting on reddit and I noticed that using VPN will immediately lead to ban. This suggests to me that all redditors are posting with their raw IP address. That's insane. (I use 4chan pass so I can use VPN and not be hassled with captcha hell) Thoughts?

Now he is making this game leaning full on into the teenage shipping and tumblr faggot crowd

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Resident Evil 4 Remake
entry.content: Just beat this game, it was okay. I can tell why people liked it back in the 2000s. Some movement and controls felt clunky and i feel like there are difficulty spikes all over the place.

entry.title: /b/ Random: i have never been more checked out of reality than i am today...i woke up from a…
entry.content: i have never been more checked out of reality than i am today...i woke up from a nap today and my suffering was different...i really do feel like "nobody" right now...my internal truths are becoming obscured...soon, there will be nothing left of the old self that i dragged kicking and screaming up to this point...the pain won't go away, but the memories will fade, and all i will have left is dreams...

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Firefox is degrading
entry.content: Hey in case you haven't noticed, this piece of shit has had a massive memory leak for at least a few months, and I think Pozilla legitimately doesn't have the technical knowhow anymore to fix it. This affects downstream forks like Librewolf btw. NOTHING is being done about this. If I leave it open for a few hours it inevitably consumes my entire 32 gigs of RAM. AI slop garbage code is slowly making all software unusable and and unfixable I'm gonna fucking kill myself.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Sentient Ragdolls?
entry.content: a few weeks ago i made this "Balance" system in roblox similar to gta 4s euphoria. there were 3 versions Version 1 did not work. Version 2 DID work BUT its arms were stuck in a t pose and version 3 had the arms freely move but not have any collision. When the player died they would stand still not falling over as a ragdoll.. there was a ragdoll script that was serverside and a localscript for the balance that was client side. it would cause the player to continue standing by adjusting its trajec

entry.title: /g/ Technology: On this 250th birthday of the greatest nation on the face of the Earth, let's ta…
entry.content: On this 250th birthday of the greatest nation on the face of the Earth, let's take a moment to look at just some of the advancements in computers that came from the USA. >The ENIAC (1st programmable, general purpose computer) >The Transistor >The Intel 4004 (first microprocessor) >Open Source >Free Software / GPL >Fortran, Cobol, Java, Javascript, C, BASIC >UNIX >The GUI >The Mouse >The Internet >The Spreadsheet >The WYSIWYG Word Processor >Hypertext and "The Web" >Email >Wolfenstein 3D & Doom >

entry.title: /g/ Technology: tired of documents rotting
entry.content: Been chipping away at this for a while: I got tired of documents either rotting (links die, apps get abandoned, viewer stops being maintained) or being bloated (PDF needs a whole rendering engine just to show text, Word needs Word). So I made EPP. It's plain text. If your text editor still exists, your document still exists. That's basically the whole pitch. >no binary blobs baked in, stays diffable/greppable >no external links to rot, it's self-contained >works fully offline, no server no runti

You may not believe I'll be happy in another life, but I will, so shut your mouth up. I'm really tired of looking at myself in the mirror and seeing a disgusting creature. I've been called a lot of names for not having a thin nose, golden hair, blue eyes, and a fair skin, and of course, living in a third world country. So, fuck you

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: THE MANDARDS
entry.content: If you can't butcher a hog, you're not a man. (Nutritional sovereignty) If you can't change your own oil, you're not a man. (Mechanical independence) If you can't do your own plumbing, you're not a man. (System mastery) If you can't build and frame your own cabin or house, you're not a man. (Structural creation) If you don't have a truck and trailer, you're not a man. (Logistical muscle) If you can't walk away from your paycheck tomorrow, you're not a man. (Financial leverage) Remember you're a

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Discs vs Downloads
entry.content: Do you prefer digital downloads for games, or physical discs? Pic related, it seems quite a lot of people want a choice. I like discs because you can resell them, and you can buy second-hand discs for less money than brand new games. I guess that's why game companies want to eliminate discs. They don't want you buying second-hand games because it means they lose a sale.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I've used a few different distros now: Debian, Ubtunu, Mint, Arch... They're all…
entry.content: I've used a few different distros now: Debian, Ubtunu, Mint, Arch... They're all the same? The biggest difference to how an OS works day to day is the DE / windows manager, and you can use any of the major DEs on any of the distros. Am I missing something? They all seem to be the same. The only thing I can think of is >Ubuntu is more bloated out the box >Mint uses a different default DE than Ubuntu >Debian lets you chose your DE on install and is less bloated >Arch makes you install / set up eve

entry.title: /b/ Random: 2.4 Million Ukrainians Died
entry.content: They died in a failed attempt to keep the people of Novorossiya under their control. But the people of Novorossiya do not consent to being ruled by the Kiev regime. 2.4 Million Ukrainian soldiers died because they refused to take "no" for an answer.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: What is the deal with people's enduring interest in superman? From my perspectiv…
entry.content: What is the deal with people's enduring interest in superman? From my perspective he is just so dull and boring and run through. He's the prototype, a blank slate which helped define a template for other works which could explore from there. There are old books which defined the form of the modern "novel" as we know it and set that template out for people, but only real dweebs give a shit about those particular books. They prefer the pure distilled lifeforce of artistic works which flowed after.

entry.content: Islam forces indians to at least ritually adhere to cleaning and wash their hands regularly, proving that any religion, or even just straight up no religion, is better than hinduism. A Pakistani or Bangladeshi factory might be overcrowded, covered in asbestos, sweaty, messy, but it will never be intentionally caked in shit

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: This shit is an awful adaptation
entry.content: The entire fucking point of the novel is that the state trying to condition Alex to be good only worsens things, and that it's up to people to grow up and mature of their own accord, goodness can only come from one's own choices. We see in chapter 21 that Pete, a droog uninvolved with the Ludovico Technique, is the one who actually matures and causes Alex to consider gowing as a person and having a family now that he is bored of the ultraviolence, possibly leading to him finally gaining a consci

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Germany
entry.content: What happened to Germany's car industry? They are Europe's strongest contender and best hope at competing with China. Why did they make so many deals with China decades ago? https://www.wsj.com/economy/china-i s-devastating-the-last-stronghold-o f-german-industry-c7a98514 https://www.telegraph.co.uk/busines s/2026/06/30/germany-may-never-reco ver-from-chinas-assault-on-carmaker s/

entry.title: /g/ Technology: How to install software in macOS: >brew install >or install it on the Mac Store …
entry.content: How to install software in macOS: >brew install >or install it on the Mac Store >or download the .dmg from the developer's website How to install software in Linux >try to find it in the official repos >only available on previous release, stopped being packaged >leftist devs got upset because they found the dev made an anti-immigration tweet after his niece was killed in the 2017 the Manchester Bombing >spend 2 hours compiling software from source i cant believe i fell for the memes

entry.title: /g/ Technology: /fwt/ - Friendly Windows Thread
entry.content: FAQ: >How do I activate Windows? HWID2 generates and registers a permanent legitimate license on MS's activation servers github.com/massgravel/Microsoft-Act ivation-Scripts Usage: paste this into Powershell, run. irm https://get.activated.win | iex >and Office? Same link, select Ohook option You can also use Office.com if your needs are very minimal or try OnlyOffice/LibreOffice and set it to save in MSOffice file formats >What version should I install? >W10 Enterprise IoT LTSC 2021 Binary ident

entry.title: /int/ International: Euros are in denial man
entry.content: A Euro I know tried to argue that a Euro doctoral program is better than an American one. As if your typical Euro grad student isn't trying to troubleshoot some instrument that he had cobbled together with the occasional part having a 'Made in West Germany' label because his university is too broke to drop a buck-fifty on bare minimum shit. entry.title: /o/ Auto: Wife is pregnant, wants me to sell my Q40 to get a truck or SUV since they're sa…
entry.content: Wife is pregnant, wants me to sell my Q40 to get a truck or SUV since they're safer. It's got 72k miles. Do you think this kind of car would ever become a collectors item? Trade is value is around $8k but I think it should be worth more... Not many NA sedans with bullet proof suspension and engines anymore getting ~320 hp stock. I've maintained it well and never put anything lower than premium in it. Runs very smooth and cosmetically looks nice. Or would hanging onto it just devalue it in 5-10 y
